scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --platform=node --format=esm --main-fields=module,main --external:node:* --external:*.node --loader:.node=empty --banner:js="import * as net from 'node:net'; import * as stream from 'node:stream'; import * as util from 'node:util'; import * as crypto from 'node:crypto'; import * as buffer from 'node:buffer'; import * as events from 'node:events'; import * as fs from 'node:fs'; import * as path from 'node:path'; import * as child_process from 'node:child_process'; import * as dns from 'node:dns'; import * as http from 'node:http'; import * as https from 'node:https'; import * as tls from 'node:tls'; import * as zlib from 'node:zlib'; import * as assert from 'node:assert'; import process from 'node:process'; const mods = { net, stream, util, crypto, buffer, events, fs, path, child_process, dns, http, https, tls, zlib, assert }; const require = (n) => { let name = n.replace(/^node:/, ''); let m = mods[name]; if (!m) throw new Error('Module ' + n + ' not found'); return Object.assign(Object.create(Object.prototype), m); }; const __dirname = '/'; const __filename = '/index.js';" --alias:net=node:net --alias:stream=node:stream --alias:util=node:util --alias:crypto=node:crypto --alias:buffer=node:buffer --alias:events=node:events --alias:fs=node:fs --alias:path=node:path --alias:child_process=node:child_process --alias:dns=node:dns --alias:http=node:http --alias:https=node:https --alias:tls=node:tls --alias:zlib=node:zlib --alias:assert=node:assert
